title: KubeVS
body:
This is an integration addon between **KubeJS** and **Valkyrien Skies 2**

This addon exposes extra VS2 info on Player, Level, and Server as well as giving your scripts access to `VSGameUtilsKt`, `VectorConversionKt`, and `VectorConversionMCKt`. Not to mention the serveral new events to give you even more access!

There is still more work to do before I am through, but i hope you all enjoy!
